purpose: Track Korea-focused MCP connectors that let AI verify official or source-grounded data directly instead of answering from memory.

openclawLiveConnections.notes: Remote public KOSIS connector. Use for official statistics with source table IDs.
Remote public architecture/building data connector. Use for building ledgers, permits, prices, and district building checks.
Remote patent/trademark/design connector with public fallback. For heavier or private use, configure a user-owned KIPRIS key through OpenClaw secrets.

candidates.primaryUse: Law, precedent, ordinance, treaty, citation verification, and legal hallucination checks.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Add after a user-owned law.go.kr OC key is available; keep as read-only.

candidates.primaryUse: Parse HWP, HWPX, PDF, XLS, XLSX, DOCX and Korean public-office documents into markdown.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Use local sandbox/fresh install first because it processes local documents and can touch sensitive files.

candidates.primaryUse: OpenDART disclosures, filings, financial statements, XBRL, attachments, holdings, insider and accounting-risk checks.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Add after a user-owned OpenDART API key is available; start with read-only filings and finance checks.

candidates.primaryUse: SchoolInfo and NEIS data such as meals, student counts, schedules, and assessment plans.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Keep available as a domain connector, but do not prioritize for owner/business workflows unless the task involves education.

candidates.primaryUse: KOSIS official statistics, regional comparisons, policy indicators, trends, and source-cited numeric checks.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Use as default source-backed statistics connector.

candidates.primaryUse: Building ledgers, permits, demolition history, old buildings, public price history, district building analysis.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Use for real-estate, store-location, construction, and facility diligence tasks.

candidates.primaryUse: KIPRIS patent, utility model, trademark, and design search.
candidates.openclawRecommendation: Use for early trademark, product-name, and invention checks; add a user-owned KIPRIS key for reliable/private-heavy use.

lastVerification.reasonNotYetConnected: These require API keys, local document/file access, or lower-priority domain routing before safe default activation.
